steps.title: Notice the opposition
steps.content: At two weeks old, wolves can smell but cannot see or hear. The next sentence says domesticated dogs can see, hear, and smell by that same point, so the transition must mark contrast.

steps.title: Reject other links
steps.content: A would restate the wolf information, but dogs are presented differently. B would introduce an example, not an opposing case. D would show a result, but the dogs' sensory development is not caused by the wolf description. The answer is C.
